idea-plugin.name: mybatis-helper
idea-plugin.description:
mybatis-helper is a lightweight and high-performance IntelliJ IDEA plugin for MyBatis development.

Key Features:

  • Java to XML Navigation: Quickly jump from a MyBatis Mapper Java interface method directly to its corresponding SQL statement tag in the XML mapper file.
  • XML to Java Navigation: Seamlessly jump back from XML statement tags (<select>, <insert>, <update>, <delete>) to their Java interface declarations.
  • High Performance: Built using optimized index-based lookup to ensure zero lag even in large codebases.
